items.body_excerpt: I know it's not exactly a novel thought, but the thing I keep coming back to that makes this — and most of his stuff — sound different is that a lot of politicians sound like they're trying to make you believe they love the place. items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Bruce Seals. Xavier of Lousiana F signed w/UTA of ABA in 73. Good active defender who was a bench guy for UTA. Signed w/SEA in 75-76 & had his best season (12 ppg 6 rpg). Left NBA for Italy in 78 at age 24 & played abroad thru 84. Died in 2020 RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
